narrative.headline: What 2020 Nissan Leaf owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 153 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (74% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: ON SEVERAL OCCASIONS IN BOTH RURAL AND SUBURBAN ENVIRONMENTS, REGARDLESS OF WEATHER TEMPERATURE OUTSIDE AND DURING NORMAL FORWARD DRIVING MOTION, THE CAR REPORTS THAT THE FORWARD CAMERA OVERHEATS AND IMMEDIATELY RENDERS THE COLLISION AVOIDANCE SYSTEM AND PROPILOT INOPERATIVE. DAS
